description: RunPod Serverless flex endpoint for the HY-World light (4090) tier. Flex workers scale to zero when idle, so idle cost is $0 and the 15-min idle requirement is satisfied NATIVELY (no watchdog needed on serverless). Weights are baked into the image, so cold-start loads from local layers.

notes.workersMin: 0 => flex scale-to-zero. Set to 1 ONLY for latency-critical always-warm serving (billed continuously; see break-even in the canvas).
notes.idleTimeout: Seconds a worker stays warm after a request before scaling down. 30s balances FlashBoot reuse vs idle burn; billing still stops at scale-to-zero either way.
notes.executionTimeoutMs: 30 min per request cap so a runaway light stage cannot bill unbounded.
notes.awsCredentials: Inject scoped, short-lived AWS creds as endpoint env at deploy time (same least-privilege role as the pod path). Never bake creds into the image.
